case_title: GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP, INC. VS CAFE PIZZELE et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-12-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,110.00 FILED BY GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAFE PIZZELE AFSARIFARD, FARSHAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-24-1999, OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAFE PIZZELE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CAFE PIZZELE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $151.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CAFE PIZZELE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAFE PIZZELE AFSARIFARD, FARSHAD $2,110.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,165.00, DEFT. FARSHAD AFSARIFARD IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
